title: 10 best herbal essential oils for ulcerative colitis
description: Rosemary essential oils helps with ulcerative colitis because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties. The oil's active compounds, such as camphor and borneol, have been shown to reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, which can help alleviate symptoms of ulcerative colitis, including abdominal pain, diarrhea, and rectal bleeding.
